mapper.insert: insert ignore into subscription_entitlement( order_id, user_id, service_package_id, total_quota, used_quota, remaining_quota, status, create_time, update_time) values( #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{servicePackageId}, #{totalQuota}, #{usedQuota}, #{remainingQuota}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select id, order_id, user_id, service_package_id, total_quota, used_quota, remaining_quota, status, create_time, update_time from subscription_entitlement where order_id = #{orderId} limit 1
mapper.update: update subscription_entitlement set status = 'REVOKED', remaining_quota = 0, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 'ACTIVE'
